title: Merge PDF - Combine Documents Offline
h1: Merge PDF Files Instantly in Your Browser
description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document using pure client-side WebAssembly. No file uploads, perfect for users in New Delhi.

sections.title: Why Merge PDF Offline?
sections.content: Instead of uploading sensitive documents to a server, our Merge PDF tool stitches your pages together directly in your browser. Complete privacy.

steps.title: Add Documents
steps.description: Select the PDFs you want to merge together.

steps.title: Reorder Pages
steps.description: Drag and drop files to get the perfect sequence.

steps.title: Merge & Save
steps.description: Click merge and download your combined document instantly.

sections.title: Seamless Merging for users in New Delhi, IN-DL
sections.content: No matter if you are in New Delhi or traveling, combining documents takes zero milliseconds of upload time.

sections.title: Enterprise-Grade Document Combining
sections.content: Merging contracts and invoices? Do it securely with our WASM engine. No traces left behind.

sections.title: Instant Combination
sections.content: Stitching PDFs locally means you can merge a 500-page document faster than you can upload it.

faqs.a: Yes! Merge as many files as you want without paying a cent.
No, all merging happens offline in your browser.

faqs.q: Can I reorder the files before merging?
faqs.a: Yes, just drag and drop the files in the preview window.

faqs.q: Is there a limit on how many files I can merge?
faqs.a: No artificial limits! Merge 10 or 100 files depending on your RAM.
Not at all. The original layers and vector data are perfectly stitched together.
